SEARCH

Package io.goobi.viewer.faces.validators

package io.goobi.viewer.faces.validators
JSF Validator implementations for the Goobi viewer, covering input validation for email addresses, passwords, nicknames, Solr queries, persistent identifiers, HTML content, and network configuration values.
  • Related Packages
    Package
    Description
    io.goobi.viewer.faces
    JSF component extensions for the Goobi viewer.
    io.goobi.viewer.faces.components
    Custom JSF UI components for the Goobi viewer, currently providing an autocomplete input and a multi-select dropdown widget for use in Facelets views.
    io.goobi.viewer.faces.converters
    JSF Converter implementations that translate between domain objects (such as users, roles, bookmarks, CMS pages, and date/time values) and their string representations for use in Facelets forms.
    io.goobi.viewer.faces.utils
    JSF utility classes for the Goobi viewer, providing helpers for building SelectItem lists used in dropdown and selection components within Facelets views.
  • Classes
    Class
    Description
    AnyStringValidator
    Validator that validates any input.
    CMSTitleValidator
    JSF validator that checks CMS page titles for uniqueness and validity constraints.
    EmailAvailableValidator
    Duplicate validator for e-mail addresses.
    EmailValidator
    Syntax validator for e-mail addresses.
    HtmlScriptValidator
    Validates that any input text has no "script" tags.
    HtmlTagValidator
    Validates that any input text has no html-tags other than <br>, <b>, <strong>, <em>, <i>, <mark>, <small>, <del>, <ins>, <sub>, <sup>.
    NicknameValidator
    Allowed characters and uniqueness validator for user nicknames (displayed names).
    PasswordValidator
    Syntax validator for passwords.
    PIInSolrValidator
    Syntax validator for passwords addresses.
    PIValidator
    Syntax validator for passwords addresses.
    RelatedPIValidator
    Validates the entered PI belonging to a record for which the current user may create CMS content.
    SolrQueryValidator
    Validates the query syntax and displays the number of hits.
    SubnetMaskValidator
    Syntax validator for subnet masks.
    URISyntaxValidator
    JSF validator that checks whether a string input is a well-formed URI.
